journal_name: Journal of Wind Engineering and Industrial Aerodynamics
scope: All aspects of wind engineering: wind effects on structures and buildings, bluff body aerodynamics, wind energy, atmospheric boundary layer, wind tunnel testing, computational wind engineering (CFD, LES), wind-induced vibrations, wind loads, pedestrian wind comfort, wind-driven rain, pollutant dispersion, codification of wind effects, aerodynamics of vehicles. Application of AI/ML for wind engineering problems.

manuscript_structure.abstract_note: Concise, factual, standalone summary. State purpose, principal results, and major conclusions. Avoid references and non-standard abbreviations.
manuscript_structure.keywords_note: Written in English. Avoid multi-word keywords with and/of. Only established abbreviations.
manuscript_structure.highlights_note: 3-5 bullet points, max 85 characters each including spaces
manuscript_structure.graphical_abstract_note: Mandatory. Preferred formats: TIFF, EPS, PDF, or MS Office files.

formatting.file_format: Word (.doc/.docx) or LaTeX. PDF not acceptable as source.

references.format: Numbered in square brackets [1] in order of appearance
examples: [1] S. Kim, J. Lee, Deep learning for wind load prediction on tall buildings, J. Wind Eng. Ind. Aerodyn. 234 (2024) 105632.
[2] J.D. Holmes, Wind Loading of Structures, third ed., CRC Press, Boca Raton, 2018.
[3] A.G. Davenport, The application of statistical concepts to the wind loading of structures, Proc. Inst. Civ. Eng. 19 (1961) 449-472.
references.formatting_rules: Author initials then surname. Article titles in regular text. Journal names in italics and abbreviated (ISO). Format: Journal Volume (Year) Pages. DOI required.

figures_tables.placement: embedded in text or end of manuscript
figures_tables.color_note: Free for online. Use distinct patterns for grayscale print.

submission_notes.equations: Numbered consecutively, numbers in parentheses flush right
submission_notes.math_notation: MathType or Word equation editor, or LaTeX math environments
submission_notes.ethical_requirements: Original unpublished work, not under review elsewhere
